sourcesContent:
// components/CityCard.jsx import React from 'react'; const COLORS = ['#378ADD', '#1D9E75', '#D85A30', '#7F77DD', '#BA7517']; export default function CityCard({ city, index, onRemove }) { const color = COLORS[index % COLORS.length]; return (
{/* Header */}
{city.name}
{city.country}
{city.current?.icon}
{/* Current temp */}
{Math.round(city.current?.temp ?? 0)}°C
{city.current?.desc}
{/* Stats row */}
💧 {city.current?.humidity ?? '--'}% 💨 {city.current?.wind ?? '--'} km/h
{/* 5-day forecast */}
{(city.forecast || []).map((d, i) => (
{d.day} {d.date} {d.icon}
{Math.round(d.high)}° {Math.round(d.low)}°
))}
); } const styles = { card: { background: '#fff', border: '1px solid #e8eaf0', borderRadius: 16, padding: '1.25rem', }, cardHeader: { display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'space-between', alignItems: 'flex-start', marginBottom: 10, }, cityName: { fontSize: 16, fontWeight: 600 }, countryLabel: { fontSize: 12, color: '#888', marginTop: 2 }, headerRight: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8 }, weatherIcon: { fontSize: 28 }, removeBtn: { background: 'none', border: '1px solid #e0e0e0', borderRadius: '50%', width: 22, height: 22, display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', fontSize: 16, color: '#aaa', lineHeight: 1, padding: 0, }, currentTemp: { fontSize: 32, fontWeight: 700, lineHeight: 1 }, currentDesc: { fontSize: 13, color: '#666', marginTop: 4 }, statsRow: { display: 'flex', gap: 12, marginTop: 8 }, stat: { fontSize: 12, color: '#888' }, divider: { border: 'none', borderTop: '1px solid #f0f0f0', margin: '12px 0' }, forecastList: { display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 7 }, forecastRow: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 8, fontSize: 13, }, forecastDay: { fontWeight: 600, minWidth: 30, color: '#444' }, forecastDate: { color: '#aaa', fontSize: 11, flex: 1 }, forecastIcon: { fontSize: 15 }, forecastTemps: { display: 'flex', gap: 6 }, tempHigh: { fontWeight: 600, color: '#333' }, tempLow: { color: '#aaa' }, };
